series_metadata.series_description: Includes documents related to obtaining and maintaining a DHS-sponsored Security Clearance, in furthermore of the DHS Classified National Security Information (CNSI) Program, administered by the STACC/SAIC. Documents include but not limited to the nomination forms, supporting documents (e.g. fingerprints, eAPP, SF 312) HSDN access and PINS, and self-reporting documentation (e.g. changes in personal status, foreign contacts, foreign travel).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office files throughout the length of the individual's security clearance (10 year max for initial issuance, followed by 10 year max for each renewal/Periodic Review, then shred once clearance is inactivated.) ; Electronic: Retain in OHS network drive throughout the length of the individual's security clearance (10 year max for initial issuance, followed by 10 year max for each renewal/Periodic Review), then delete once clearance is inactivated, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
